greeting.line: Nothing to see out here. Go home. Forget about it. That's friendly advice.
greeting.line_friendly: Friendly advice, then: stick to the lit streets.
greeting.line_hostile: I said go home. That was the soft version.

lore.line: Some blocks I'd stay away from after dark. Not because of crime. Just — routine maintenance. The kind you don't want to watch. Go on home now.
